people always ask me how i d do in today s game  are you kidding me  if they re playing that switch everything defense  and i got a point guard on me in the post  man  i wouldn t even dribble  i d just turn around  drop step  and it s barbecue chicken every single time down  the coach would have to call a timeout after two minutes

people always ask me what i was thinking on that last drive and honestly i wasn t thinking anything coherent my left wrist was bothering me i remember that i kept wiggling it between plays like an idiot

people always want to know what i m thinking before a free throw and honestly sometimes it s just i need to get a haircut like i ll be standing there at the line in game 6 and that s genuinely where my brain went and i made both of them so i don t know what that tells you
people ask me what i was thinking on that last drive and honestly i wasn t thinking anything my brain was just it was quiet which is weird because my brain is never quiet ask my wife

people ask me what i was thinking on that last drive and honestly i wasn t thinking anything that s the whole point the moment you start narrating it to yourself you re already a half second behind and in this league a half second is the whole game

people ask me what i was thinking on that last lap and honestly i wasn t thinking anything coherent it s more like your hands are just ahead of your brain the whole time and you only catch up after you ve already won or already crashed

people ask me what i was thinking on that putt and honestly i wasn t thinking about anything my caddie said something to me right before i stepped up and i had to ask him to repeat it twice because i just i wasn t there and it went in so i don t know what that tells you
